scripts.typecheck: node node_modules/typescript-7/bin/tsc -p restale-kit/tsconfig.json --noEmit && node node_modules/typescript-7/bin/tsc -p examples/conceptual-inline-demo/client/tsconfig.json --noEmit && node node_modules/typescript-7/bin/tsc -p examples/conceptual-inline-demo/server/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.validate: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint
